title: neomammillaria polyedra
intro: Neomammillaria polyedra, also known as the "Pincushion Cactus," is a type of small, globular cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neomammillaria polyedra include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, salves, and ointments, which can be used topically to treat various health issues.
